1→"""Tests for erk create --copy-plan flag.""" 2→ 3→from click.testing import CliRunner 4→ 5→from erk.cli.cli import cli 6→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import WorktreeInfo 7→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 8→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_isolated_fs_env 9→ 10→ 11→def test_create_copy_plan_success() -> None: 12→ """Test --copy-plan copies plan directory to new worktree.""" 13→ from erk_shared.impl_folder import get_impl_dir 14→ 15→ runner = CliRunner() 16→ with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: 17→ # Setup: Create branch-scoped impl folder in current worktree (at repo root) 18→ source_impl_dir = get_impl_dir(env.cwd, branch_name="main") 19→ source_impl_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) 20→ (source_impl_dir / "plan.md").write_text("# Plan content", encoding="utf-8") 21→ progress_content = ( 22→ "---

## Summary of Changes
Successfully renamed all CLI flag strings as requested:
### `--copy-plan` → `--copy-pr` (7 occurrences) - Line 1: Docstring at file top - Line 12: Test function docstring - Line 41: Comment in test - Line 44: CLI argument in `runner.invoke()` - Line 78: Test function docstring - Line 95: Comment in test - Line 98: CLI argument in `runner.invoke()` - Line 154: Test function docstring - Line 193: Comment in test - Line 196: CLI argument in `runner.invoke()` - Line 213: Test function docstring - Line 249: Comment in test - Line 252: CLI argument in `runner.invoke()`
### `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file` (3 occurrences) - Line 112: Test function docstring - Line 139: CLI argument in `runner.invoke()` - Line 150: String assertion in `assert "--from-pr-file" in result.output`
### `--copy-plan` in assertions (1 occurrence) - Line 149: String assertion in `assert "--copy-pr" in result.output`
All changes are limited to CLI flag name strings in: - Docstrings and comments - `runner.invoke()` argument lists - String assertions checking output
No unrelated code was modified.
